2604.19070.title: TRN-R1-Zero: Text-rich Network Reasoning via LLMs with Reinforcement Learning Only
2604.19070.paper_summary: Zero-shot reasoning on text-rich networks (TRNs) remains a challenging frontier, as models must integrate textual semantics with relational structure without task-specific supervision. While graph neural networks rely on fixed label spaces and supervised objectives, recent large language model (LLM)-based approaches often overlook graph context or depend on distillation from larger models, limiting generalisation. We propose TRN-R1-Zero, a post-training framework for TRN reasoning trained solely via reinforcement learning. TRN-R1-Zero directly optimises base LLMs using a Neighbour-aware Group Relative Policy Optimisation objective that dynamically adjusts rewards based on a novel margin gain metric for the informativeness of neighbouring signals, effectively guiding the model toward relational reasoning. Unlike prior methods, TRN-R1-Zero requires no supervised fine-tuning or chain-of-thought data generated from large reasoning models. Extensive experiments across citation, hyperlink, social and co-purchase TRN benchmarks demonstrate the superiority and robustness of TRN-R1-Zero. Moreover, relying strictly on node-level training, TRN-R1-Zero achieves zero-shot inference on edge- and graph-level tasks, extending beyond cross-domain transfer. The codebase is publicly available at https://github.com/superallen13/TRN-R1-Zero.
2604.19070.paper_summary_zh: 零-shot 推理在文本豐富的網絡（TRNs）上仍然是一個具有挑戰性的前沿，因為模型必須在沒有特定任務監督的情況下整合文本語義與關係結構。雖然圖神經網絡依賴於固定的標籤空間和監督目標，但最近基於大型語言模型（LLM）的方法往往忽視圖的上下文或依賴於從更大模型的蒸餾，限制了其泛化能力。我們提出了 TRN-R1-Zero，一個僅通過強化學習訓練的 TRN 推理後訓練框架。TRN-R1-Zero 直接優化基礎 LLM，使用一種鄰域感知的群體相對策略優化目標，根據一種新穎的邊際增益指標動態調整獎勵，以衡量鄰近信號的信息量，從而有效引導模型朝向關係推理。與之前的方法不同，TRN-R1-Zero 不需要監督微調或從大型推理模型生成的思維鏈數據。在引用、超鏈接、社交和共同購買 TRN 基準上的廣泛實驗展示了 TRN-R1-Zero 的優越性和穩健性。此外，TRN-R1-Zero 嚴格依賴於節點級訓練，在邊和圖級任務上實現了零-shot 推理，超越了跨域轉移。代碼庫可在 https://github.com/superallen13/TRN-R1-Zero 獲得。
2604.19070.author: Yilun Liu et.al.
2604.19070.authors: Yilun Liu, Ruihong Qiu, Zi Huang
